it_services_superadmin.name: WiFi Connection Drop in Room 302
it_services_superadmin.description: Users in Room 302 are experiencing intermittent WiFi disconnections. The signal strength seems fine, but DHCP allocation fails repeatedly.
it_services_superadmin.resolution: Reconfigured the local switch port and restarted the Unifi AP in the hallway. Signal and IP allocation are stable now.

it_services_superadmin.name: ERP Database Backup Failure Notification
it_services_superadmin.description: The automated daily backup job failed with error code 0x44F: Connection Timeout. Needs verification.
it_services_superadmin.resolution: Backup target path storage was full. Cleared old archive files and manually re-triggered the backup job (completed successfully).

it_services_superadmin.name: Printer Paper Jam & Driver Offline
it_services_superadmin.description: The main network printer (HP LaserJet Pro) on the 2nd floor has a paper jam error that won't clear even after removing the paper. Drivers show offline for all users.
it_services_superadmin.resolution: Cleared a tiny torn piece of paper from the fuser sensor and reset the printer's print spooler service.

it_services_superadmin.name: Core Switch Offline - High Priority Alert
it_services_superadmin.description: Ping lost to Core Switch B (192.168.1.12). Server Room ventilation fan stopped, causing overheating.

it_services_joseph_diala.resolution: I refilled the ink tank with black and turned off the ink indicator so that the warning would go away. I restarted his printer spooler.

it_services_joseph_diala.name: Google Sheet App Script setup.
it_services_joseph_diala.description: He wants his Google Sheets to have automation forms and fill data entries.
it_services_joseph_diala.resolution: I made an app script for his Google Sheets to have privacy and automation for his Google Sheets. So that others cannot access them.

it_services_joseph_diala.name: Editing Invoices
it_services_joseph_diala.description: just need to put system-generated invoices
it_services_joseph_diala.resolution: I filled in and edited all 14 invoices, filled in all the system-generated invoices, and printed them out for reference.

it_services_joseph_diala.name: Printing Issues
it_services_joseph_diala.description: Unable to print because the printer model installed on his laptop is different
it_services_joseph_diala.resolution: I reinstalled the printer and put in the correct model. I reset the printer spooler on his laptop. and the unit worked and was printing.

it_services_joseph_diala.name: Printing Issues
it_services_joseph_diala.description: The printer cannot print because there is a problem with the printer spooler.
it_services_joseph_diala.resolution: I reset their printer spooler, removed and cleaned the pickup roller of their printer. I also adjusted the paper loading in the printer's paper tray. I tried to print and it worked.

it_services_joseph_diala.name: Failed to open or login on Sysfreight
it_services_joseph_diala.description: Unable to open or log in to sysfreight
it_services_joseph_diala.resolution: Using the IT Toolkit I made, I Cleared DNS cache, Reset IP Stack and winsock, released and renewed IP, and full reset IP, winsock, HTTP, Firewall and DNS to refresh his network adapter and system. I restarted his computer and it worked.
